zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Norreys於1420年5月出生在英國英格蘭爾塔文時，她的父親Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke34歲，母親Elizabeth Harington22歲。她和Richard Colman至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1477年5月18日在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 瓦爾迪費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Norreys was born in May 1420, in Tarvin, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Harington, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Richard Colman. She died on 18 May 1477, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Norreys im Mai 1420 in Tarvin, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harington 22. Sie hatte mit Richard Colman mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Norreysが1420年5月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアターヴィンで生まれた時，父Sir William Le Norreys Of Spekeは34歳，母Elizabeth Haringtonは22歳であった。彼女はRichard Colmanとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1477年5月18日にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクグレアト ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Norreys(이)가 1420년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 터아르빈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harington(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Richard Colman(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1477년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그리트 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Norreys родилась май 1420 г. в местности тарвин, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harington, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Richard Colman. Она умерла 18 мая 1477 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности грит валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
